title: Kyiv: Casualties reported
description: Update: At least 30 people killed in Kyiv following Russia's July 2 large-scale attack. The death toll in Russia's July 2 large-scale missile and drone attack on Kyiv has grown to 30 people, after three more bodies were recovered in the rubble, Ukraine's State Emergency Service said.
description_en: Update: At least 30 people killed in Kyiv following Russia's July 2 large-scale attack. The death toll in Russia's July 2 large-scale missile and drone attack on Kyiv has grown to 30 people, after three more bodies were recovered in the rubble, Ukraine's State Emergency Service said.
description_uk: Update: At least 30 people killed in Kyiv following Russia's July 2 large-scale attack. The death toll in Russia's July 2 large-scale missile and drone attack on Kyiv has grown to 30 people, after three more bodies were recovered in the rubble, Ukraine's State Emergency Service said.

title: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: Dear defenders of Ukraine! I congratulate you on the Day of the Anti-Aircraft Missile Troops of the Air Force of the Armed Forces of Ukraine! Since the beginning of the full-scale Russian aggression, you have become a reliable shield of the Ukrainian sky. Every day and every night, your combat calculations repel the attacks of cruise and ballistic missiles, attack drones and aviation, protecting our cities and towns, infrastructure and production facilities,...

Від початку повномасштабної російської агресії ви стали надійним щитом українського неба. Щодня і щоночі ваші бойові розрахунки відбивають атаки крилатих і балістичних ракет, ударних безпілотників та авіації, захищаючи наші міста й селища, інфраструктурні й виробничі об'єкти,...

title: Evacuation ordered
description: Dear soldiers of the army aviation of the Ground Forces of the Armed Forces of Ukraine! I sincerely congratulate you on your professional holiday! The Ukrainian sky has indomitable defenders. In the most difficult conditions, under enemy fire, you raise helicopters to support infantry, strike at the enemy, destroy enemy drones, evacuate the wounded, perform dozens of other tasks on which the lives of Ukrainians depend...

У найскладніших умовах, під вогнем противника, ви підіймаєте гелікоптери, щоб підтримати піхоту, завдати ударів по противнику, знищити ворожі дрони, евакуювати поранених, виконати десятки інших завдань, від яких залежать життя українських...

title: Attack attack
description: After the flights, electricity and water disappeared in Russian Belgorod. Probably, Mychurynskaya CHP was hit. According to other information, the Energomash plant was attacked.

description: Update: 4 dead, 11 injured after train collides with minibus in Rivne Oblast. Three of the injured victims are children, Governor Oleksandr Koval reported. The circumstances of the accident are being investigated. Photo: Oleksandr Koval / Telegram

description: 'Moscow will fall' — 13 Russian power stations shut down across occupied Ukraine, military says. The operation targeted energy facilities in occupied Crimea as well as in the occupied parts of Ukraine's Donetsk, Luhansk, and Zaporizhzhia oblasts, Unmanned Systems Forces Commander Robert "Madyar" Brovdi reported on July 2.

title: Air defense active
description: 🤬 The Russian Federation has begun to massively use jet "Shakheds", which are faster than Ukrainian interceptor drones, - The Telegraph Izdanie writes that new Russian drones with Chinese turbojet engines develop speeds of up to 500 km/h - against approximately 300-350 km/h for Ukrainian interceptor drones. Due to this, mobile air defense groups and interceptor drones do not always manage to shoot them down, therefore...
description_en: 🤬 The Russian Federation has begun to massively use jet "Shakheds", which are faster than Ukrainian interceptor drones, - The Telegraph Izdanie writes that new Russian drones with Chinese turbojet engines develop speeds of up to 500 km/h - against approximately 300-350 km/h for Ukrainian interceptor drones. Due to this, mobile air defense groups and interceptor drones do not always manage to shoot them down, therefore...
description_uk: 🤬 рф начала массово применять реактивные "Шахеды", которые быстрее украинских дронов-перехватчиков, - The Telegraph Издание пишет, что новые российские дроны с китайскими турбореактивными двигателями развивают скорость до 500 км/ч - против примерно 300-350 км/ч у украинских дронов-перехватчиков. Из-за этого мобильные группы ПВО и дроны-перехватчики уже не всегда успевают их сбивать, поэтому...

title: Kyiv: Air defense active
description: Ukraine urgently appeals to nearly 40 allies for Patriot interceptors. Ukraine says Patriot missiles are already available in partner countries' stockpiles and urged nearly 40 countries to transfer them in July after one of Russia's largest attacks on Kyiv.

title: 🇯🇵 Minister of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andriy Sybiga in Tokyo took...

description: 🇯🇵 Minister of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andriy Sybiga in Tokyo took part in the Ukrainian-Japanese business dialogue on energy issues, organized by the Japan External Trade Promotion Organization (JETRO). Andrii Sybiga emphasized that the recovery of Ukraine opens up significant opportunities for mutually beneficial cooperation with Japanese business, primarily in the energy sector. The minister invited...
description_en: 🇯🇵 Minister of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andriy Sybiga in Tokyo took part in the Ukrainian-Japanese business dialogue on energy issues, organized by the Japan External Trade Promotion Organization (JETRO). Andrii Sybiga emphasized that the recovery of Ukraine opens up significant opportunities for mutually beneficial cooperation with Japanese business, primarily in the energy sector. The minister invited...
description_uk: 🇯🇵 Міністр закордонних справ України Андрій Сибіга у Токіо взяв участь в Українсько-японському бізнес-діалозі з питань енергетики, організованому Японською організацією сприяння розвитку зовнішньої торгівлі (JETRO). Андрій Сибіга наголосив, що відновлення України відкриває значні можливості для взаємовигідної співпраці з японським бізнесом, насамперед в енергетичній сфері. Міністр запросив...

title: Kyiv: Attack attack
description: Around 800,000 of Ukrainian publisher’s books destroyed in overnight Russian attack. According to BookChef, the central warehouse of their logistics partner — where their books were stored — was completely destroyed.
description_en: Around 800,000 of Ukrainian publisher’s books destroyed in overnight Russian attack. According to BookChef, the central warehouse of their logistics partner — where their books were stored — was completely destroyed.

title: Kharkiv: Attack attack on residential area
title_en: Kharkiv: Attack attack on residential area
description: Liquidation of the consequences of the Russian attack continues in Kyiv: rescuers are sorting through rubble, looking for people, and providing assistance. Damage was recorded in more than 20 locations in the city, and mostly these are ordinary residential buildings. An ambulance station, a scientific institute, a hotel, and businesses were also destroyed. As of now, it is known that 13 people, unfortunately, died as a result of this Russian strike. My...
description_en: Liquidation of the consequences of the Russian attack continues in Kyiv: rescuers are sorting through rubble, looking for people, and providing assistance. Damage was recorded in more than 20 locations in the city, and mostly these are ordinary residential buildings. An ambulance station, a scientific institute, a hotel, and businesses were also destroyed. As of now, it is known that 13 people, unfortunately, died as a result of this Russian strike. My...
description_uk: У Києві триває ліквідація наслідків російської атаки: рятувальники розбирають завали, шукають людей, надають допомогу. У місті зафіксовані пошкодження на понад 20 локаціях, і переважно це звичайні житлові будинки. Також руйнувань зазнали станція швидкої допомоги, науковий інститут, готель, підприємства. Станом на зараз відомо, що 13 людей, на жаль, загинули від цього російського удару. Мої...
